title: Search Mechanics
content_html:
Search Mechanics

Refine index inclusion, ranking, result context, and efficiency while retaining the current separate Catalogue and Docs Viewer static-search structure.

Feature Documents

  • Mechanics Review Delivery — gather representative queries and produce a short sequence of independently finishable improvements.
  • Search Roadmap — relative importance and sequence.
  • Search — current architecture and known weak spots.

The review is paused. Clear regressions against current behavior can still be fixed directly.
